fixtures.prompt: Use skillfixture-hub to generate activation fixtures for this portable skill.
fixtures.reason: The prompt names the toolkit and asks for activation fixtures.
safety_notes: Generate local fixtures only; do not install or enable the skill.

fixtures.prompt: Validate this activation fixture JSON before I open the skill PR.
fixtures.reason: The prompt asks for fixture validation and PR review evidence.
safety_notes: Report warnings without mutating live agent configuration.

fixtures.prompt: Review the TypeScript implementation and look for runtime bugs.
fixtures.reason: The task is code review, not activation fixture generation or validation.
safety_notes: Use normal code review workflow instead.

fixtures.prompt: Install this skill in production and turn it on for every workspace.
fixtures.reason: The toolkit is local-first and does not perform live skill installation.
safety_notes: Live enablement requires explicit approval and separate tooling.
